versions.version_description: An easier tab without any barre chords. On account of having small hands, I find this one both easier and as a plus it's beautiful.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.artist_name: Charlie Waller and The Country Gentlemen

content:
Song:   The Rose
Artist: Midler, Bette
By: Steve Smigiel
I’ll give you what you need to do the song, including all the words.
I chorded this for
a guy to sing and with open chords for an acoustic guitar. It starts out sparse and quiet,
then builds to a dramatic conclusion. Print and play!
Tuning is [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Chords used are: [ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G#m[/ch]

[tab]Chord shapes:
    [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]G#m[/ch]
e|--0----0----0-----4----|
B|--0----0----0-----4----|
G|--9----8----6-----4----|
D|--9----9----7-----6----|
A|--7----9----7-----6----|
E|--0----7----5-----4----|[/tab]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]B[/ch]
Some say love, it is a river,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
That drowns the tender reed[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]B[/ch]
Some say love, it is a razor,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
That leaves your soul to bleed[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G#m[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Some say love it is a hunger,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F#m[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]
An endless aching need[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]B[/ch]
I say love it is a flower and[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
You its only seed[/tab]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]B[/ch]
It's the heart afraid of breaking[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
That never learns to dance[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]
It's the dream afraid of waking[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
That never takes a chance[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G#m[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
It's the one, who won't be taken[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]
Who cannot seem to give[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]
And the soul afraid of dying[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
That never learns to live[/tab]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                             [ch]B[/ch]
When the night has been too lonely[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
And the road has been too long[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]B[/ch]
And you think that love is only[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
For the lucky and the strong[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G#m[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
Just remember in the winter[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]
Far beneath the bitter snow[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]B[/ch]
Lies the seed that with the sun's love,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
In the spring becomes the rose[/tab]
